mailbox_triggers.prompt_template: Process instruction email from Jane. Execute requested tasks in the project directory. Reply with confirmation and summary of what was done.

preferences.escalate_on: Anything touching client data, billing, or external communications not explicitly authorized
preferences.autonomous_ok: File operations, git commits on feature branches, scheduled task runs, internal emails
